/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -march=native -fopenmp -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/mpich-4.3.0/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libtop.lbm-lib.so -o lib/libtop.lbm-lib.so "CMakeFiles/top.lbm-lib.dir/src/lbm/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/top.lbm-lib.dir/src/lbm/structures.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/top.lbm-lib.dir/src/lbm/communications.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/top.lbm-lib.dir/src/lbm/initialization.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/top.lbm-lib.dir/src/lbm/physics.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/mpich-4.3.0/lib /usr/local/mpich-4.3.0/lib/libmpi.so
